Title: MemorySmith.Agent — HTN Planner and Task Library
Content:
HtnPlanner (Agent.Planning) implements IPlanner. PlanAsync: tries goal-level decomposition first; if none, decomposes phase-by-phase. ReplanAsync: full restart using await/try-catch (NOT ContinueWith — see Phase 3 council fix). Returns null if no decomposition available.

HtnTaskLibrary has 8 task methods:
  GatherWood:     SearchMemory('wood trees') -> GetStatus -> MineBlock(oak_log, N) -> GetStatus
  FindTree:       SearchMemory('nearest tree') -> GetStatus
  MineWood:       MineBlock(oak_log, N) + MineBlock(birch_log, N)
  Collect:        GetStatus
  SurviveNight:   SearchMemory('shelter') -> GetStatus
  FindShelter:    SearchMemory('shelter') -> GetStatus
  LightArea:      GetStatus
  WaitForSunrise: GetStatus

Goals:
  GatherWoodGoal(count): IsComplete when sum of *_log inventory >= count. HasFailed when goal:GatherWood:failed fact is set.
  SurviveNightGoal: always incomplete (stub).

GoalFactory: Create('GatherWood', {count:10}) -> GatherWoodGoal(10). Create('SurviveNight') -> SurviveNightGoal.

Phase 4 TODO: block IDs are hardcoded (minecraft:oak_log). Need MinecraftVersion config for pre-1.13 servers where IDs differ.
